blended.narrative: Lake Louise is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,805 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
